title: Playgro Teether Bees -Soft Water-Filled Teething Rings for Babies 3 Months+ - Freezable Cooling Teething Rings to Soothe Sore Gums, BPA-Free - Durable Design with Fun Bee Shape - Multicoloured - 2Pack
features: Soft, water filled teething rings with cute bee design to soothe sore gums, Suitable from 3 months
Many gripping possibilites: Child-friendly size, Ideal for small hands
Put teething rings in fridge before use to have cooling effect
Made of robust and durable material, Easy to clean: Washable with damp cloth, BPA-free
Contents: 1x Playgro Teether Bees, Water filled, 2 Pack, Dimensions (LxWxH): 0,1 x 1,4 x 21,5 cm, Material: 27 % EVA, 73 % Water, Multicoloured, Art.No.: 40200
